title: Lime Green Square Paper Dessert Plates (17cm) 16 Count - Elegant & Sturdy Party Tableware for Appetizers, Cakes and More
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Our lime green square paper dessert plates add a touch of sophistication to any celebration, making them perfect for appetizers, cakes, and more. Impress your guests with this stylish and sturdy party tableware.

HIGH-QUALITY PAPER PLATES: Measuring 17cm, these square dessert plates are constructed with high-quality materials, ensuring durability and stability while holding up to all types of delicious treats.
ALLURING LIME GREEN: Enhance your event's ambiance by incorporating these striking lime green dessert plates, expertly crafted to make a bold statement and elevate your table setting.
PACK OF 16: This pack includes 16 lime green square paper dessert plates, providing ample quantity to accommodate all your guests and contribute to a cohesive party theme.

VERSATILE & CONVENIENT: Ideal for a variety of occasions, including birthdays, weddings, and holiday events, these easy-to-dispose paper plates will make your party clean-up a breeze, allowing you to enjoy the festivities to the fullest.
description: From the manufacturer Solid Colour Tableware Add some flair to any occasion with these tableware options from Unique Party!
